content:
@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix_grace_boundary
C: "<" ∧ skew_30s ∧ keep_401 ∧ ms_normalized
P: off_by_one ∧ "<="_vs_"<" ∧ sign_flip
V: edge_-30s_200 ∧ edge_-31s_401 ∧ exact_expiry_401 ∧ missing_token_401
A: patch_compare_site ∧ assert_"<"_strict ∧ add_boundary_tests ∧ preserve_"next(err)"

@flint v0 hybrid
G: modular_monolith
C: team_6 ∧ "4 months" ∧ low_ops ∧ fast_ship
P: "PostgreSQL" ∧ clear_seams ∧ stable_apis ∧ no_shared_mutable
V: boundary_tests ∧ module_api_contracts ∧ dep_graph_lint
A: ship_monolith ∧ split("post_release") ∧ defer_decomposition

[AUDIT]
Goal: modular_monolith.
Constraints: team_6 and "4 months" and low ops and fast shipping.
Plan: "PostgreSQL" and clear_seams and stable_apis and no_shared_mutable.
Verify: boundary_tests and module_api_contracts and dep_graph_lint.
Answer target: ship_monolith and split("post_release") and defer_decomposition.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: verify_header_auth_risk
C: at_public_edge("x-user-id") ∧ session_authoritative ∧ public_gateway_boundary
P: client_sends("x-user-id") ∧ bypass_session ∧ horizontal_priv_escalation
V: drop_at_gateway("x-user-id") ∧ bind_scope_from_session ∧ missing_session_returns("401") ∧ spoofed_header_denied
A: spoof_header_test ∧ missing_session_test("401") ∧ cross_user_denial_test ∧ gateway_strip_assertion

[AUDIT]
Goal: verify_header_auth_risk.
Constraints: at_public_edge("x-user-id") and session_authoritative and public_gateway_boundary.
Plan: client_sends("x-user-id") and bypass_session and horizontal_priv_escalation.
Verify: drop_at_gateway("x-user-id") and bind_scope_from_session and missing_session_returns("401") and spoofed_header_denied.
Answer target: spoof_header_test and missing_session_test("401") and cross_user_denial_test and gateway_strip_assertion.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: port_to_async_await
C: legacy_callback ∧ single_path("next(err)") ∧ minimal_diff ∧ preserve_signature
P: wrap_callback_promise ∧ "async" ∧ handler ∧ "await" ∧ load_user ∧ try_catch_to("next(err)") ∧ same_order
V: success_path ∧ validation_fail ∧ not_found_branch ∧ downstream_error ∧ no_double_next
A: this_binding_risk ∧ unhandled_rejection ∧ order_drift

[AUDIT]
Goal: port_to_async_await.
Constraints: legacy_callback and single_path("next(err)") and minimal_diff and preserve_signature.
Plan: wrap_callback_promise and "async" and handler and "await" and load_user and try_catch_to("next(err)") and same validation order.
Verify: success_path and validation_fail and not_found_branch and downstream_error and no_double_next.
Answer target: this_binding_risk and unhandled_rejection and order_drift.
